[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010111 4
1 10010000 2
2 10100110 4
3 00011101 4
4 11110110 6
5 11101101 6
6 11100101 5
7 10010010 3

67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11111111 a
